summary: PR 2614 marks melee/if/if_2FC93.c as Matching in configure.py and adjusts GALE01 split and symbol metadata around if_2FC93.c and adjacent ifprize.c data ranges. The diff narrows if_2FC93 ownership for rodata, bss, and sdata2, adds corresponding ifprize ranges, converts several previously global un_* data symbols in if_2FC93-owned ranges to local @ labels, and shortens selected bss/sbss symbol sizes.

evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk at MatchingFor list

key_files.role: Updates section ownership boundaries for melee/if/if_2FC93.c and adds adjacent rodata, bss, and sdata2 ranges to melee/if/ifprize.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt hunk around melee/if/if_2FC93.c and melee/if/ifprize.c

key_files.role: Changes symbol scope/name metadata for data in the affected ranges, including local @ labels for several rodata, data, sdata, and sdata2 entries and size adjustments for bss/sbss symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks at 0x803B8780, 0x803F99C8, 0x804A1F10, 0x804D5820, 0x804D6D90, 0x804DDBAC

what_changed.text: Configured melee/if/if_2FC93.c as Matching instead of NonMatching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/if/if_2FC93.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/if/if_2FC93.c")

what_changed.text: Reduced if_2FC93.c split ownership: rodata end changed from 0x803B8810 to 0x803B8790, bss end from 0x804A1F58 to 0x804A1F48, and sdata2 end from 0x804DDCC8 to 0x804DDBD0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt if_2FC93.c section changes

what_changed.text: Added corresponding ifprize.c ownership ranges for rodata 0x803B8790-0x803B8810, bss 0x804A1F48-0x804A1F58, and sdata2 0x804DDBD0-0x804DDCC8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt ifprize.c added section ranges

what_changed.text: Converted several data symbols from global un_* names to local @ labels in the if_2FC93-owned ranges: 0x803B8780, 0x803F99C8, 0x803F99F0, 0x804D5820, 0x804D5828, and 0x804DDBAC through 0x804DDBC8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt local label replacements

what_changed.text: Adjusted bss/sbss symbol sizes at un_804A1F10 from 0x38 to 0x34 and un_804D6D90 from 0x8 to 0x4, and added a local bss label at 0x804A1F10.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt bss and sbss hunks

smart_moves.text: The matching-status change was paired with split and symbol metadata updates, rather than only flipping configure.py. This keeps section ownership and symbol scope aligned with the newly linked object.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py matching flip
raw_diff: splits.txt and symbols.txt metadata edits

smart_moves.text: Adjacent ifprize.c ranges were made explicit where if_2FC93.c ownership was narrowed, reducing ambiguity at the translation-unit boundary.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt if_2FC93.c end reductions and ifprize.c added ranges

decomp_lessons.text: When linking an object as Matching, check whether nearby data/split metadata also needs to move from broad or global ownership to precise local labels and adjacent translation-unit ranges.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py marks if_2FC93.c Matching
raw_diff: splits.txt narrows if_2FC93.c and adds ifprize.c ranges
raw_diff: symbols.txt global un_* symbols changed to local @ labels

naming_conventions.text: For data determined to be local in this PR, anonymous local @ labels were used instead of global un_* names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt local label replacements

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Linking tactic shown by the diff: change the object status to Matching only alongside section-boundary and symbol-scope metadata updates for the object and adjacent TU.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py
raw_diff: splits.txt
raw_diff: symbols.txt

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Data-boundary tactic shown by the diff: split off trailing rodata, bss, and sdata2 ranges from if_2FC93.c to the following ifprize.c entry when linking if_2FC93.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt hunk around if_2FC93.c and ifprize.c

accepted_candidate_records.title: Matching link PRs may require split and symbol metadata alignment
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2614 linked melee/if/if_2FC93.c by changing configure.py to Matching while also narrowing if_2FC93.c split ownership, adding adjacent ifprize.c ranges, and converting several affected data symbols from global un_* names to local @ labels. This supports a candidate lesson that object-linking changes should be reviewed together with section-boundary and symbol-scope metadata when the diff includes them.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py matching flip
raw_diff: splits.txt boundary edits
raw_diff: symbols.txt scope/name edits
